glosses.ro: a se descurca; a se înțelege bine (cu)
glosses.ja: うまくやっていく; 仲良くやっていく（〜と）

sentences.target: Ich kann mit dem neuen Handy zurechtkommen.
sentences.reading: /ɪç kan mɪt deːm ˈnɔɪ̯ən ˈhɛndi tsuˈʁɛçtˌkɔmən/

translations.de: Ich kann mit dem neuen Handy zurechtkommen.
translations.ipa: /ɪç kan mɪt deːm ˈnɔɪ̯ən ˈhɛndi tsuˈʁɛçtˌkɔmən/
translations.en: I can manage with the new phone.
translations.es: Puedo arreglármelas con el teléfono nuevo.
translations.fr: Je me débrouille avec le nouveau téléphone.
translations.it: Me la cavo con il nuovo telefono.
translations.ko: 새 휴대폰은 잘 다룰 수 있어.
translations.pt: Consigo lidar com o telefone novo.
translations.vi: Tôi dùng được điện thoại mới.
translations.nl: Ik kan overweg met de nieuwe telefoon.
translations.hi: मैं नए फोन से काम चला सकता हूँ.
translations.el: Τα καταφέρνω με το καινούργιο τηλέφωνο.
translations.nb: Jeg klarer meg med den nye telefonen.
translations.id: Aku bisa pakai ponsel baru ini.
translations.sv: Jag klarar av den nya telefonen.
translations.da: Jeg kan finde ud af den nye telefon.
translations.ja: 新しいスマホは使いこなせます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary (present, 1st sg) expressing ability/possibility; selects a bare infinitive at clause end.
Preposition governing dative; introduces a comitative/instrumental prepositional phrase.
Definite article, dative singular neuter; agrees with the head noun 'Handy'.
Attributive adjective modifying 'Handy'; dative singular neuter with weak inflection (-en) after a definite article.
Common noun, neuter; head of the PP governed by 'mit'; dative singular.
Separable verb meaning 'to cope/manage'; here as bare infinitive governed by the modal, not split.

translations.en: You will manage on your own tomorrow.
translations.es: Mañana podrás arreglártelas por tu cuenta.
translations.fr: Demain, tu t'en sortiras par toi-même.
translations.it: Domani te la caverai per conto tuo.
translations.ko: 내일은 혼자서도 잘 할 수 있을 거야.
translations.zh-Hans: 明天你自己能应付得来。
translations.pt: Amanhã você vai se virar por conta própria.
translations.vi: Ngày mai bạn tự lo được.
translations.el: Αύριο θα τα καταφέρεις μόνος σου.
translations.nb: I morgen klarer du deg alene.
translations.sv: I morgon klarar du dig själv.
translations.ro: Mâine te vei descurca pe cont propriu.
translations.da: I morgen klarer du dig selv.
translations.ja: 明日は一人でも大丈夫です。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular nominative; subject.
Auxiliary 'werden' (present, 2nd sg) forming future tense; selects a clause-final infinitive.
Temporal adverb specifying time.
Adverb meaning 'alone'; expresses manner/state of the subject.
Separable verb meaning 'to cope/manage'; bare infinitive in future construction, not split.

sentences.target: Wir werden mit wenig Geld zurechtkommen.

translations.de: Wir werden mit wenig Geld zurechtkommen.
translations.en: We will get by with little money.
translations.es: Nos las arreglaremos con poco dinero.
translations.fr: On s'en sortira avec peu d'argent.
translations.it: Ce la caveremo con pochi soldi.
translations.ko: 우리는 적은 돈으로도 살아갈 수 있을 거야.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们用很少的钱也能过得去。
translations.yue: 我哋用好少錢都過得去。
translations.ru: Мы сможем прожить на небольшие деньги.
translations.pt: Vamos nos virar com pouco dinheiro.
translations.vi: Chúng ta sẽ xoay xở được với ít tiền.
translations.nl: We redden ons wel met weinig geld.
translations.uk: Ми зможемо прожити на малі гроші.
translations.hi: हम कम पैसों में काम चला लेंगे.
translations.el: Θα τα βγάλουμε πέρα με λίγα χρήματα.
translations.nb: Vi skal klare oss med lite penger.
translations.id: Kita akan bisa bertahan dengan sedikit uang.
translations.sv: Vi kommer att klara oss på lite pengar.
translations.ro: Ne vom descurca cu puțini bani.
translations.da: Vi skal nok klare os med få penge.
translations.ja: 私たちは少ないお金でもやっていけます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject.
Auxiliary forming future tense (present, 1st pl); selects a clause-final infinitive.
Preposition governing dative; introduces a comitative/instrumental PP.
Quantifying determiner before a mass noun; no inflection here.
Common noun, neuter; head of the PP governed by 'mit'; dative singular (form identical to nominative).
Separable verb meaning 'to cope/manage'; bare infinitive in future construction, not split.

sentences.target: Sie sollte mit den Kindern zurechtkommen.

translations.de: Sie sollte mit den Kindern zurechtkommen.
translations.en: She should be able to handle the kids.
translations.fr: Elle devrait pouvoir gérer les enfants.
translations.ko: 그녀는 아이들을 잘 돌볼 수 있을 거야.
translations.yue: 佢應該應付到啲小朋友。
translations.pt: Ela deve dar conta das crianças.
translations.vi: Cô ấy chắc sẽ lo được бọn trẻ.
translations.ar: من المفترض أن تتمكن من التعامل مع الأطفال.
translations.nl: Ze zou de kinderen wel aankunnen.
translations.hi: उसे बच्चों को संभाल लेना चाहिए.
translations.el: Θα έπρεπε να τα καταφέρνει με τα παιδιά.
translations.ro: Ar trebui să se descurce cu copiii.
translations.cs: Měla by si poradit s dětmi.
translations.ja: 彼女は子どもたちの相手ができるはずです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject.
Modal auxiliary (preterite, 3rd sg) expressing advice/obligation; selects a bare infinitive.
Preposition governing dative; introduces a comitative PP.
Definite article, dative plural; agrees with 'Kindern'.
Common noun, plural dative of 'Kind'; object of 'mit'.
Separable verb meaning 'to cope/manage'; bare infinitive governed by the modal, not split.

en: I can manage with the new phone.
You will manage on your own tomorrow.
We will get by with little money.
She should be able to handle the kids.
